text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, I catch sight of Tosen Jordan as I'm
walking by the dance studio.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: All right! Not a single mistake!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Hey, keep your voice down! I'm making a video
here!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Saying that, she walks over to her phone to stop
recording.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Whatever, it's fine. I guess I can just cut the bit
with you talking. I'll upload it later.
choice_data_list:
I thought you were practicing for winning
concerts.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Nah, I was making stuff for UmaTok.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
I mean, it's kinda like practice, right? I can't
afford to be cringe when I'm dancing.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
There's, like, so many good dancers, you know?
Everyone is sooo cute!
choice_data_list: Well, you can't let them outdo you!
Well, you can't let them outdo you!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
There's, like, so many good dancers, you know?
Everyone is sooo cute!
choice_data_list: Well, you can't let them outdo you!
Well, you can't let them outdo you!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Hold on. Don't go projecting onto me, okay?
That's not what this is about.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
And hold up. The way you said that, it's almost
like...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
You make it sound like I'm losing right now... or
whatever...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Ah... never mind! Anyway, show's over. Get out!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As I'm leaving, I hear her mutter, "Just you
watch!" But I decide not to mention that I heard
anything.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
What's up with you all of a sudden? I don't need
you to flatter me.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Cut it out already! Enough! You're making it super
awkward!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Go and stand over there! I can't focus!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tosen Jordan makes a bit of a commotion at first,
but she follows it up with some sharp dance
moves.
